tips.text: Each pair = ONE motion, not two

tips.text: If a pair feels slow, drill it 10x

character_tips.anna: Bigrams are speed building blocks. Pair = motion.
character_tips.maxim: Top bigrams. Single units in your muscle memory.
character_tips.knopych: ⚡ BIGRAM SPEED! Two keys, ONE attack!
character_tips.klavochka: Letter couples dancing together, my dear 💑
